name: Air Phantom X
description: Next-gen carbon-plate running shoe with ReactX foam midsole. Built for marathon pace, weighs 218g.

name: Ultra Boost 24
description: Boost midsole returns 70% energy. Primeknit+ upper adapts to foot shape. Ideal for daily long runs.

name: Gel-Kayano 32
description: Stability shoe with 4D Guidance System and FF Blast+ Eco cushioning. For overpronators logging high mileage.

name: Clifton 10
description: Maximum stack, minimum weight. Early-stage meta-rocker for effortless transitions. 255g.

name: Fresh Foam X 1080v14
description: Dual-density Fresh Foam X midsole with Hypoknit upper. The gold standard for everyday neutral training.
